sigmoid.note: Early stop at epoch 11 (patience=10). Model never learned.

ste.note: Early stop at epoch 11 (patience=10). Converged to near-chance.

triangular.note: Early stop at epoch 23 (patience=10). Near-chance performance.

lso.note: CRASHED: TypeError: StochasticSpikeOperator.forward() missing 1 required positional argument: 'variance'. snnTorch 0.9.4 + Python 3.14 incompatibility. LSO uses StochasticSpikeOperator internally, which expects a 'variance' argument that the surrogate.LSO(slope=0.1) call does not supply.

sfs.note: Run separately (script had crashed at LSO). Early stop at epoch 10. Stochastic surrogate fails same as sigmoid. Best at epoch 1, never improved.
